description_long: This kiosk features a modular, rectangular structure with a partially enclosed layout and a prominent open front. The exterior panels are finished in a vibrant blue color, with the brand name 'SEGO MODULAR LIGHTBOX' displayed in large white letters on multiple sides. The interior rear wall showcases a high-resolution photographic mural depicting a person standing near a glacier and an orange tent, adding visual interest and thematic branding. The kiosk is constructed with sturdy, likely metal framing and smooth panel surfaces, and it sits atop a wood-textured platform. The design is clean and modern, with no visible windows or doors, and the open front allows easy access for visitors.
description: A modern, blue modular kiosk with open front access, branded 'SEGO MODULAR LIGHTBOX' and featuring a photographic mural inside. The structure is sleek, with solid panels and a wood-textured base.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the open entry, interior mural with a glacier scene, and blue branded side panels.
description_view_1: Top-down rear view highlighting the open roof section and the solid blue back panel with branding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full blue back wall with 'SEGO MODULAR LIGHTBOX' text and no entry points.
description_view_3: Side view showing the blue side panel with branding and the open front entryway.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo, placed on front, side, and rear blue panels with 'SEGO MODULAR LIGHTBOX' text in white.
attribute_door_configuration: Open archway at the front; no doors visible.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof with partial open section, constructed from solid panels matching the kiosk's blue exterior.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern minimalist with clean lines and bold branding.
